task:
Build a brand-new 5-slide interactive navigation deck in LibreOffice Impress and save it as /home/user/Documents/nav_deck.odp in ODF Presentation (.odp) format. The deck must contain:

- Slide 1 — title 'Menu'. The slide must contain three rectangle shapes whose text reads, respectively, 'Section A', 'Section B', and 'Section C'. Each rectangle must have a click-interaction during slideshow that jumps to the corresponding section slide:
  - 'Section A' rectangle → jump to Slide 2 ('Section A')
  - 'Section B' rectangle → jump to Slide 3 ('Section B')
  - 'Section C' rectangle → jump to Slide 4 ('Section C')
- Slide 2 — title 'Section A'
- Slide 3 — title 'Section B'
- Slide 4 — title 'Section C'
- Slide 5 — title 'Thanks'

verification.description: Slide 1 contains a shape with text 'Section A'
Slide 1 contains a shape with text 'Section B'
Slide 1 contains a shape with text 'Section C'
Rectangle 'Section A' on slide 1 jumps to the 'Section A' slide
Rectangle 'Section B' on slide 1 jumps to the 'Section B' slide
Rectangle 'Section C' on slide 1 jumps to the 'Section C' slide
